name: parallax-header
title: Parallax Header
description: A stretchy image header for a scroll view: pulling down zooms the image, scrolling up collapses it with an optional blur, a legibility gradient, and a fading title. Zero-wiring via KVO. Zero dependencies.
usage:
let header = ParallaxHeader(image: UIImage(named: "cover"))
header.attach(to: scrollView)
